CREATE TABLE request_logs (id integer PRIMARY KEY, request_header varchar);
INSERT INTO request_logs (id, request_header) VALUES (1, 'Host: www.example.com');
INSERT INTO request_logs (id, request_header) VALUES (2, 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0');
INSERT INTO request_logs (id, request_header) VALUES (3, 'Accept: text/html');
IF len = 0 THEN SET host = '*** NO HEADERS IN REQUEST ***'; END IF;
WHILE (ix < len) DO http(aref(header, ix)); ix := ix + 1; END WHILE;
SELECT http_request_header(lines, 'Host', null, '*** NO HOST IN REQUEST ***') AS Host FROM request_logs WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM request_logs WHERE request_header LIKE '%User-Agent%';
SELECT http_request_header(lines, 'Accept', null, '*** NO ACCEPT IN REQUEST ***') FROM request_logs WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM request_logs WHERE request_header LIKE '%Accept%');
INSERT INTO request_logs (id, request_header) VALUES (4, 'Host: localhost');
SELECT http_request_header(lines, 'Host', null, '*** NO HOST IN REQUEST ***') AS Host FROM request_logs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM request_logs);
CREATE VIEW header_summary AS SELECT id, http_request_header(lines, 'Host', null, '*** NO HOST IN REQUEST ***') AS HostHeader FROM request_logs;
SELECT * FROM header_summary WHERE HostHeader IS NOT NULL;
